security.apiKey.label: PromptGuard API Key
security.apiKey.help: PromptGuard API key for AI security scanning (fallback: PROMPTGUARD_API_KEY env var). Get one at https://app.promptguard.co

security.baseUrl.label: PromptGuard API Base URL
security.baseUrl.help: Custom PromptGuard API endpoint. Defaults to https://api.promptguard.co/api/v1

security.mode.label: Enforcement Mode
security.mode.help: enforce: block detected threats. monitor: log threats without blocking.

security.scanInputs.label: Scan Inputs
security.scanInputs.help: Scan user messages for prompt injection before sending to the LLM.

security.scanToolArgs.label: Scan Tool Arguments
security.scanToolArgs.help: Scan tool call arguments for injection, exfiltration, and code injection.

security.redactPii.label: Redact PII
security.redactPii.help: Automatically redact personally identifiable information from outgoing messages.
